MYSTERY OF GODLINESS.
(Continued from page 314.)
If we turn attention to the ceremonial law— the divers washings, anointings, sprinklings, sacrifices, feasts and ordinances, that were per- formed under the Mosaic economy, wo find as much difficulty in accounting for it, philosoph- ically; or in other words, according to tho lim- ited philosophy of men. If we could compre- hend that philosophy…
